AAPL.title: Apple (AAPL) Stock After 129% Five-Year Rally Is There Still Value Here
AAPL.summary: If you are wondering whether Apple stock still offers value after its strong run, the answer depends heavily on how you look at price versus fundamentals. At a last close of US$299.24, Apple has returned 3.0% over the past week, was roughly flat over the past month with a 0.3% decline, and has delivered 10.4% year to date, 53.6% over 1 year, 64.0% over 3 years, and 129.1% over 5 years.
